axeyum_fragments: Interval bounds, fixed-step error recurrences, floating-point sanity checks, exact rational shadows

example_packs.notes: LU replay, interval bounds, fixed-step error recurrences, and rational shadows.
Exact Matrix Invariant And Characteristic Polynomial Checks
Exact Finite Spectral Linear Algebra Checks

proof_routes.name: Stability and convergence theorems need proof support; floating-point experiments need tolerances and seeds.
proof_routes.notes: Field-level proof route is a planning row until a concrete example pack validates.

rows.title: Optimization and convexity
rows.summary: Undergraduate / graduate applied math. First Axeyum slice: LP feasibility, linear certificates, finite rational convexity checks, small quadratic checks, monotonicity/threshold examples
axeyum_fragments: LP feasibility, linear certificates, finite rational convexity checks, small quadratic checks, monotonicity/threshold examples

example_packs.notes: LP feasibility, threshold cliffs, and Farkas-style certificates.
Finite midpoint convexity, second differences, affine threshold monotonicity, and bad midpoint-convexity rejection.
Exact Numerical Linear Algebra Error Bounds
Exact Finite Spectral Linear Algebra Checks

rows.title: Probability theory
rows.summary: Undergraduate / graduate applied and pure math. First Axeyum slice: Finite probability tables, random variables, conditional expectation, finite stochastic kernels, finite martingales, finite hitting times, finite concentration/tail bounds, conditional probability, Bayes rule, finite expectations, product tables, and exact discrete distributions
axeyum_fragments: Finite probability tables, random variables, conditional expectation, finite stochastic kernels, finite martingales, finite hitting times, finite concentration/tail bounds, conditional probability, Bayes rule, finite expectations, product tables, and exact discrete distributions

example_packs.notes: Finite mass tables, random variables, conditional expectation, kernels, martingales, hitting times, concentration/tail bounds, conditioning, Bayes rule, product measures, and exact discrete distributions.
Finite Product Measure And Fubini Checks
